reviews.comment:
Ideal para abastecer de agua y combustible, ricas chipas un oasis en el medio de la ruta aburrida rumbo a ctes lindo lugar para acampar es una parada obligatoria por ruta!!!

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for stocking up on water and fuel, delicious chipas, an oasis in the middle of the boring route to Ctes, a nice place to camp, it's a must-stop along the route!!!

reviews.comment:
En un lugar sumamente estratégico...faltaria tema de comidas...es precaria...siempre falta algo. Además de una mejor playa para estacionar ya que para muchos viajeros es un lugar clásico y necesario, siempre un amontonamiento.

(Translated by Google)
In a highly strategic location... the food options are lacking... it's basic... there's always something missing. Also, a better parking area is needed, as it's a classic and essential spot for many travelers, and it's always congested.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaDVtcGtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bastante bien, a la ida no tenía súper.. a la vuelta no tenía infinia tampoco. El lugar y la atención bien. Comidas, café u gaseosas

(Translated by Google)
Pretty good, they didn't have Super on the way there... and they didn't have Infinia on the way back either. The place and the service were good. Food, coffee, or sodas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBczVXakpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Realmente pésimo la atención, falta de higiene en los sanitarios, con todos los socios que mensualmente aportan, deberían de mantener Impecable, realmente es una VERGÜENZA!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service was absolutely terrible, the restrooms were unhygienic, and with all the members who contribute monthly, they should keep everything spotless. It's truly a disgrace!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcmZxQWlBRRAB
